title: § 1-105. Act, how cited.
text:
Sections 1-105 to 1-171 shall be known and may be cited as the Public Accountancy Act.

History: Laws 1957, c. 1, § 64, p. 78; Laws 1991, LB 75, § 14; Laws 1994, LB 957, § 7; R.S.Supp.,1996, § 1-169; Laws 1997, LB 114, § 1; Laws 2009, LB31, § 1; Laws 2015, LB159, § 1.
